title: theobroma bernoullii subsp. asclepiadiflorum
intro: Theobroma bernoullii subsp. asclepiadiflorum, also known as the Asclepiadiflorum sub-species of the Theobroma bernoullii plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Malvaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating pain, and soothing digestive issues, making it a valuable resource in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of Theobroma bernoullii subsp. asclepiadiflorum include infusions and decoctions, which can be used to extract its medicinal compounds and utilize its health benefits.
